name: commit
description: Git commit with conventional commits format
author: claudekit
content:
# Commit Skill

Automates git commits following conventional commits specification. Analyzes staged changes, generates descriptive commit messages, and handles multi-file commits with proper scoping.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use commit
```

## Features
- Conventional commit format (feat, fix, docs, etc.)
- Auto-detect change type from diff
- Multi-line body for complex changes
- Breaking change detection

name: test-runner
description: Intelligent test execution with failure analysis and recommendations
author: claudekit
content:
# Test Runner Skill

Executes test suites with smart failure detection and actionable recommendations. Analyzes test output, identifies root causes, and suggests fixes for common test failures.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use test-runner
```

## Features
- Multi-framework support (Jest, Vitest, Pytest, Go test)
- Failure pattern recognition
- Coverage analysis
- Performance regression detection
- Flaky test identification

name: code-reviewer
description: AI-powered code review focusing on best practices and security
author: claudekit
content:
# Code Reviewer Skill

Provides comprehensive code reviews checking for security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and adherence to best practices. Generates actionable feedback with examples.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use code-reviewer
```

## Features
- Security vulnerability scanning
- Performance optimization suggestions
- Code smell detection
- Best practices enforcement
- Language-specific checks (TS, Python, Go, Rust)
- Integration with GitHub PR comments

name: planner
description: Break down features into actionable implementation phases
author: claudekit
content:
# Planner Skill

Analyzes feature requirements and creates detailed implementation plans with phases, tasks, and dependencies. Generates architecture diagrams and technical specifications.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use planner
```

## Features
- Phase-based planning with dependencies
- Architecture diagram generation
- Task breakdown with time estimates
- Risk assessment
- Success criteria definition
- Parallel execution planning

name: debugger
description: Debug production issues with log analysis and root cause identification
author: claudekit
content:
# Debugger Skill

Analyzes logs, stack traces, and runtime behavior to identify root causes of bugs. Provides step-by-step debugging strategies and fix recommendations.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use debugger
```

## Features
- Log pattern analysis
- Stack trace interpretation
- Memory leak detection
- Race condition identification
- Performance profiling
- Integration with APM tools (Datadog, New Relic)

name: security-scanner
description: Scan code for security vulnerabilities and compliance issues
author: secureai
content:
# Security Scanner Skill

Comprehensive security analysis covering OWASP Top 10, dependency vulnerabilities, secret exposure, and compliance checks (GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA).

## Usage

```
npx skillx use security-scanner
```

## Features
- OWASP Top 10 vulnerability detection
- Dependency vulnerability scanning (npm, pip, cargo)
- Secret detection in code and commits
- Compliance checks (GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA)
- Infrastructure security (Docker, K8s)
- SBOM generation

name: api-designer
description: Design RESTful and GraphQL APIs with OpenAPI spec generation
author: claudekit
content:
# API Designer Skill

Designs APIs following REST and GraphQL best practices. Generates OpenAPI specs, GraphQL schemas, and API documentation.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use api-designer
```

## Features
- RESTful API design with proper HTTP semantics
- GraphQL schema design with relay pagination
- OpenAPI 3.1 spec generation
- API versioning strategy
- Rate limiting recommendations
- Authentication/authorization patterns

name: database-optimizer
description: Optimize database queries and schema design for performance
author: dataops
content:
# Database Optimizer Skill

Analyzes slow queries, suggests indexes, and optimizes schema design for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB. Provides query rewriting recommendations.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use database-optimizer
```

## Features
- Slow query analysis with execution plans
- Index recommendations
- Schema normalization/denormalization guidance
- N+1 query detection
- Connection pool tuning
- Partitioning strategies
- Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB

name: docker-builder
description: Generate optimized Dockerfiles with multi-stage builds
author: claudekit
content:
# Docker Builder Skill

Creates production-ready Dockerfiles with multi-stage builds, layer caching optimization, and security hardening.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use docker-builder
```

## Features
- Multi-stage build optimization
- Minimal base image selection
- Layer caching strategies
- Security scanning integration
- Non-root user configuration
- Health check setup
- Supports Node, Python, Go, Rust, Java

name: ci-cd-generator
description: Generate CI/CD pipelines for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, CircleCI
author: claudekit
content:
# CI/CD Generator Skill

Generates CI/CD pipeline configurations for popular platforms. Includes build, test, security scanning, and deployment stages.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use ci-cd-generator
```

## Features
- GitHub Actions workflow generation
- GitLab CI/CD pipeline templates
- CircleCI config creation
- Matrix builds for multiple environments
- Caching strategies
- Secret management
- Deployment to AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel

name: migration-planner
description: Plan and execute database migrations with rollback strategies
author: dataops
content:
# Migration Planner Skill

Creates safe database migration plans with zero-downtime strategies, rollback procedures, and data validation scripts.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use migration-planner
```

## Features
- Zero-downtime migration strategies
- Rollback procedure generation
- Data validation scripts
- Schema diff analysis
- Backfill strategy planning
- Supports Drizzle, Prisma, Alembic, Flyway

name: docs-generator
description: Generate comprehensive documentation from code and comments
author: claudekit
content:
# Documentation Generator Skill

Generates API docs, architecture diagrams, and user guides from code analysis and comments. Supports markdown, HTML, and PDF output.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use docs-generator
```

## Features
- API documentation from JSDoc/TSDoc
- Architecture diagram generation (Mermaid, PlantUML)
- User guide templates
- Tutorial generation
- Changelog automation
- Integration with VitePress, Docusaurus, MkDocs

name: refactor-assistant
description: Suggest and apply safe refactoring patterns to improve code quality
author: claudekit
content:
# Refactor Assistant Skill

Identifies refactoring opportunities and applies safe transformations like extract method, inline variable, and move file.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use refactor-assistant
```

## Features
- Extract method/function
- Inline variable/constant
- Move class/file
- Rename symbol with scope analysis
- Convert to composition
- Reduce cyclomatic complexity
- Test preservation validation

name: performance-profiler
description: Profile application performance and identify bottlenecks
author: perftools
content:
# Performance Profiler Skill

Analyzes runtime performance, identifies CPU and memory bottlenecks, and suggests optimization strategies.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use performance-profiler
```

## Features
- CPU profiling with flame graphs
- Memory leak detection
- Bundle size analysis
- Runtime performance monitoring
- Core Web Vitals optimization
- Database query profiling
- Integration with Chrome DevTools, Lighthouse

name: api-client-generator
description: Generate type-safe API clients from OpenAPI specs
author: apitools
content:
# API Client Generator Skill

Generates type-safe API clients in TypeScript, Python, Go, and Rust from OpenAPI 3.x specifications.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use api-client-generator
```

## Features
- Type-safe client generation
- Auto-completion support
- Request/response validation
- Retry logic with exponential backoff
- Authentication handling
- Supports TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust
- Works with OpenAPI 3.x and Swagger 2.0

name: error-tracker
description: Track and analyze production errors with smart grouping
author: observability
content:
# Error Tracker Skill

Tracks production errors, groups similar issues, and provides context for debugging. Integrates with Sentry, Rollbar, and Bugsnag.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use error-tracker
```

## Features
- Smart error grouping
- Stack trace analysis
- User impact assessment
- Trend analysis
- Alert configuration
- Integration with Sentry, Rollbar, Bugsnag
- Slack/Discord notifications

name: load-tester
description: Simulate high traffic loads and measure system capacity
author: perftools
content:
# Load Tester Skill

Simulates realistic user traffic patterns, measures throughput and latency, and identifies system breaking points.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use load-tester
```

## Features
- Realistic traffic simulation
- Throughput and latency metrics
- Breaking point identification
- Stress testing scenarios
- Spike testing
- Endurance testing
- Integration with k6, Gatling, Locust

name: dependency-updater
description: Update dependencies safely with breaking change analysis
author: claudekit
content:
# Dependency Updater Skill

Updates dependencies while analyzing breaking changes, running tests, and generating migration guides.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use dependency-updater
```

## Features
- Breaking change detection
- Migration guide generation
- Automated test execution
- Rollback on failure
- Security patch prioritization
- Supports npm, pip, cargo, go modules
- Integration with Dependabot, Renovate

name: schema-validator
description: Validate JSON schemas and generate TypeScript types
author: apitools
content:
# Schema Validator Skill

Validates JSON schemas, generates TypeScript types, and ensures API request/response consistency.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use schema-validator
```

## Features
- JSON Schema validation
- TypeScript type generation
- Runtime validation
- Schema evolution tracking
- Breaking change detection
- Supports JSON Schema, Zod, Yup, Joi

name: deployment-checker
description: Pre-deployment validation and smoke testing
author: claudekit
content:
# Deployment Checker Skill

Runs pre-deployment checks including schema validation, API health checks, and smoke tests.

```
npx skillx use deployment-checker
```

## Features

- API health checks
- Smoke test execution
- Rollback readiness verification
- Resource capacity checks
- Integration with AWS, GCP, Azure, Vercel

name: e2e-tester
description: End-to-end testing with Playwright and Cypress
author: testautomation
content:
# E2E Tester Skill

Generates and executes end-to-end tests using Playwright or Cypress. Includes visual regression testing and accessibility checks.

```
npx skillx use e2e-tester
```

## Features
- Test generation from user flows
- Visual regression testing
- Accessibility testing (WCAG 2.1)
- Cross-browser testing
- Mobile device simulation
- Video recording on failure
- Supports Playwright, Cypress

name: cost-analyzer
description: Analyze cloud infrastructure costs and suggest optimizations
author: cloudops
content:
# Cost Analyzer Skill

Analyzes cloud spending across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Identifies cost optimization opportunities and suggests rightsizing.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use cost-analyzer
```

## Features
- Multi-cloud cost analysis
- Idle resource detection
- Rightsizing recommendations
- Reserved instance suggestions
- Spot instance opportunities
- Cost trend forecasting
- Supports AWS, GCP, Azure

name: architecture-reviewer
description: Review system architecture for scalability and reliability
author: sysdesign
content:
# Architecture Reviewer Skill

Reviews system architecture diagrams and code structure for scalability, reliability, and maintainability concerns.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use architecture-reviewer
```

- Service boundary analysis
- Data flow optimization

- C4 model diagram generation

name: accessibility-auditor
description: Audit web apps for WCAG 2.1 compliance and accessibility issues
author: a11ytools
content:
# Accessibility Auditor Skill

Audits web applications for WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA compliance. Identifies accessibility issues and provides remediation guidance.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use accessibility-auditor
```

## Features
- WCAG 2.1 Level AA/AAA testing
- Screen reader compatibility checks
- Keyboard navigation testing
- Color contrast analysis
- ARIA attribute validation
- Semantic HTML review
- Integration with axe-core, Pa11y

name: log-analyzer
description: Parse and analyze application logs to extract insights
author: observability
content:
# Log Analyzer Skill

Parses structured and unstructured logs, extracts patterns, and identifies anomalies. Supports JSON, syslog, and custom formats.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use log-analyzer
```

## Features
- Pattern extraction
- Anomaly detection
- Error rate trends
- Log correlation across services
- Natural language queries
- Integration with ELK stack, Loki, CloudWatch
- Supports JSON, syslog, custom formats

name: feature-flag-manager
description: Manage feature flags and progressive rollouts
author: cloudops
content:
# Feature Flag Manager Skill

Manages feature flags, progressive rollouts, and A/B tests. Integrates with LaunchDarkly, Split, and custom implementations.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use feature-flag-manager
```

## Features
- Progressive rollout strategies
- User targeting and segmentation
- A/B test configuration
- Kill switch implementation
- Flag cleanup detection
- Integration with LaunchDarkly, Split, Flagsmith
- Multi-environment support

name: graphql-optimizer
description: Optimize GraphQL queries and detect N+1 issues
author: apitools
content:
# GraphQL Optimizer Skill

Analyzes GraphQL queries for N+1 issues, suggests DataLoader patterns, and optimizes resolver performance.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use graphql-optimizer
```

## Features
- N+1 query detection
- DataLoader pattern implementation
- Query complexity analysis
- Resolver batching
- Caching strategies
- Persisted queries setup
- Works with Apollo, Relay, GraphQL Yoga

name: compliance-checker
description: Check code and infrastructure for regulatory compliance
author: secureai
content:
# Compliance Checker Skill

Scans code and infrastructure for GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS compliance. Generates audit reports and remediation guidance.


## Features
- GDPR compliance checks (data privacy, consent)
- SOC2 controls validation
- HIPAA safeguards verification
- PCI-DSS requirements (payment data)
- Audit trail generation
- Remediation guidance
- Continuous compliance monitoring

name: mobile-ci-builder
description: Build and test iOS and Android apps in CI/CD pipelines
author: mobileops
content:
# Mobile CI Builder Skill

Configures CI/CD pipelines for React Native, Flutter, and native iOS/Android apps. Handles code signing, testing, and distribution.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use mobile-ci-builder
```

## Features
- iOS provisioning profile management
- Android keystore handling
- Automated screenshot testing
- Beta distribution (TestFlight, Firebase App Distribution)
- App Store/Play Store deployment
- Supports React Native, Flutter, Swift, Kotlin

name: cache-optimizer
description: Design and optimize caching strategies for better performance
author: perftools
content:
# Cache Optimizer Skill

Analyzes caching strategies, recommends cache layers (CDN, Redis, in-memory), and optimizes cache invalidation patterns.

## Usage

```
npx skillx use cache-optimizer
```

## Features
- Cache strategy design (write-through, write-behind, cache-aside)
- TTL optimization
- Cache invalidation patterns
- Cache hit rate analysis
- CDN configuration
- Redis/Memcached optimization
- Supports Cloudflare, Fastly, Redis, Memcached
